stories.headline: White House Says CLARITY Act Deal Is 'Very Close'
stories.tldr: Top Trump crypto adviser Patrick Witt said outstanding hurdles on the CLARITY Act are clearing, signaling Senate passage could come within weeks.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: CLARITY would split crypto oversight between the SEC and CFTC and finally give exchanges, DeFi protocols, and token issuers a U.S. rulebook — the single biggest regulatory unlock the industry has chased since 2022.
the_details: Witt said negotiations 'made considerable progress in the background' and 'we're very close to closing them out'
Senate returns from recess this week with CLARITY back on the agenda alongside the National Credit Union Administration's stablecoin issuer comment window closing
Bank earnings (BlackRock, JPM, C) hit the same week, putting institutional crypto exposure under fresh scrutiny

stories.headline: PARITY Act Returns to Rewrite U.S. Crypto Tax Rules
stories.tldr: Reps. Steven Horsford (D) and Max Miller (R) re-introduced the PARITY Act, a bipartisan bill that would defer staking and mining taxes and exempt small stablecoin payments.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The bill would close the wash-sale loophole that crypto traders have used since 2014 — but in exchange, gives stakers, miners, and everyday stablecoin users meaningful relief U.S. lawmakers have refused for years.
the_details: Staking and mining rewards taxed only at sale, not at receipt — a major win for validators and pools
No gain or loss recognized on stablecoin payments where cost basis is within 1% of redemption value
30-day wash-sale rule would now apply to crypto, ending instant tax-loss harvesting strategies
Bill text was re-released March 26 and is targeted for formal introduction this spring

stories.headline: Bitmine Hits NYSE With 4.8M ETH and $4B Buyback
stories.tldr: Tom Lee's Bitmine Immersion uplisted from NYSE American to the main NYSE board, now holding 4.8 million ETH worth over $10 billion plus a $4B share buyback.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Bitmine has quietly become the world's largest ETH treasury — roughly 4% of all ether ever issued — and is openly targeting 5%. That's MicroStrategy-scale concentration, but for Ethereum.
the_details: Added 71,252 ETH in the week ending April 5, lifting holdings to 4.803M tokens
Board lifted 2025 share repurchase authorization from $1B to $4B — among the 10 largest buybacks announced in 2026
Uplist to the senior NYSE board took effect April 9, opening the door to broader institutional and index inclusion

stories.headline: Anthropic's Mythos AI Spooks DeFi Security Stack
stories.tldr: Anthropic's withheld Mythos Preview model autonomously found zero-days in TLS, AES-GCM and SSH — the same primitives DeFi, exchanges, and bridges depend on.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Friction-based defenses crypto leans on — multisig, timelocks, audit reports — get materially weaker when adversaries can run an AI that out-hacks human researchers. Quantum was theoretical; this is shipping now.
the_details: Anthropic deemed Mythos too dangerous to release; access limited to a small group of major tech firms
Vulnerabilities span every major OS, browser, and core cryptography library used by HTTPS, exchanges, and DeFi node infrastructure
Anthropic explicitly warned that 'mitigations whose security value comes primarily from friction rather than hard barriers may become considerably weaker'

stories.headline: Securitize Brings Tokenized RWAs to TRON
stories.tldr: Securitize, the BlackRock-backed RWA platform with $4B+ AUM, integrated with TRON to expand its tokenized funds onto the network with $7.9T in annual transfer volume.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: TRON's stablecoin rails dwarf most chains in real-world payment volume — putting Apollo, BlackRock, and Hamilton Lane tokenized funds where actual dollars already move accelerates the on-chain TradFi flywheel.
the_details: Tokenized funds and securities issued via Securitize will be available on TRON's 373M-account network with $26B TVL
A new RWA product purpose-built for TRON is in the works; details to come 'in the near future'
Adds to Securitize's multichain footprint alongside Ethereum, Avalanche, Polygon, and Aptos

stories.headline: Bitcoin Steadies Near $73K as Hormuz Risk Eases
stories.tldr: BTC has clawed back to $73,400 and crude slipped under $100 as markets digest a fragile Middle East stand-down after last weekend's Trump blockade order.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Crypto is still trading as a macro-risk asset tethered to oil and Middle East headlines. Until that link breaks, every Hormuz tweet is a price catalyst — including in the wrong direction.
the_details: BTC briefly slipped below $71,000 on April 12 after Trump ordered a Strait of Hormuz blockade
Vance said U.S.–Iran negotiators failed to extend their two-week ceasefire, knocking majors 2–4%
Spot bitcoin ETFs bled $325.8M on April 13 — Fidelity's FBTC alone shed $229M

stories.headline: Riot Sold $290M of Bitcoin in Q1 to Fund Hashrate
stories.tldr: Riot Platforms unloaded $289.5M of BTC in Q1 2026 to fund operations as deployed hashrate hit 42.5 EH/s, up 26% year-over-year.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Public miners are increasingly net sellers, not HODLers — quietly redirecting freshly mined BTC from corporate treasury into rig expansion and AI/HPC pivots. That changes the post-halving sell pressure picture.
the_details: Average operating hashrate climbed 23% YoY to 36.4 EH/s
Sales offset capex on rig deployments and grid-scale infrastructure
Continues a trend across listed miners (CleanSpark, Marathon) of rotating BTC into operational growth rather than accumulating
